ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Primary genre associated with the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the artist */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist or band was founded */,
  "members" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of band members (if applicable) */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label the artist is signed to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the album is a compilation */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "preferred_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred genre */,
  "preferred_artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the user's preferred artist */,
  "preferred_mood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred mood */,
  "preferred_bpm_range" TEXT /* Range of preferred BPM (e.g., '70-100') */,
  "preferred_decade" TEXT /* Preferred decade of music (e.g., '1990s') */,
  "preferred_tempo_range" TEXT /* Range of preferred tempo (e.g., '120-140') */,
  "preferred_energy_range" TEXT /* Range of preferred energy (e.g., '0.5-0.8') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streaming event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who streamed the track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track that was streamed */,
  "stream_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was streamed */,
  "stream_time" TEXT /* Time when the track was streamed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the track was streamed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for streaming (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "stream_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the stream in seconds */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for streaming */,
  "is_skipped" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the track was skipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track-genre relationship */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight or relevance score of the genre to the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_artists" (
  "track_artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track-artist relationship */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the track (e.g., main artist, featured artist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_artists_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lyrics" (
  "lyric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of lyrics */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "lyricist_id" TEXT /* ID of the primary lyricist */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the lyrics (e.g., official, user-generated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lyric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lyrics_lyricist_id FOREIGN KEY ("lyricist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the recommended track */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., 'based on your listening history') */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., 'algorithm', 'curator') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track in the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the playlist is public */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist cover art */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers for the playlist */,
  "tracks_count" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the subscription (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "next_billing_date" TEXT /* Date of the next billing cycle */,
  "is_auto_renew" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the subscription auto-renews */,
  "plan_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing details of the subscription plan (e.g., features, price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided feedback */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track that was rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was created */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback is flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the feedback (e.g., 'inappropriate content') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or profile description */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
